children.heading: Additional statements
children.label: a Additional statements
children.text: Except to the extent the Secretary requires additional or different statements on any cigarette package by a regulation, by an order, by a standard, by an authorization to market a product, or by a condition of marketing a product, pursuant to the Family Smoking Prevention and Tobacco Control Act (and the amendments made by that Act), or as required under or , no statement relating to smoking and health, other than the statement required by , shall be required on any cigarette package.section 387c(a)(2) of title 21section 387t(a) of title 21section 1333 of this title

children.heading: State regulations
children.label: b State regulations
children.text: No requirement or prohibition based on smoking and health shall be imposed under State law with respect to the advertising or promotion of any cigarettes the packages of which are labeled in conformity with the provisions of this chapter.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: c Exception
children.text: Notwithstanding subsection (b), a State or locality may enact statutes and promulgate regulations, based on smoking and health, that take effect after the effective date of the Family Smoking Prevention and Tobacco Control Act, imposing specific bans or restrictions on the time, place, and manner, but not content, of the advertising or promotion of any cigarettes.
